requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality Evidence — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 for Turkmenistan PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量证据——土库曼斯坦光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質證據——土庫曼斯坦光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000

summary.en: For Turkmenistan PV inverter projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared around IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and the applicable IEC 61000-series emission, immunity, and harmonic-current standards. Publicly confirmed Turkmenistan solar-inverter EMC technical regulations have not been identified in this dataset; exporters should therefore treat EMC as a Turkmenstandartlary conformity and Turkmenenergo project-review matter, with exact report scope confirmed for each project. Desert dust, high ambient temperature, enclosure ventilation, cable routing, grounding, and surge-protection design can affect EMC performance and should be addressed in the technical dossier.
summary.zh: 对于土库曼斯坦光伏逆变器项目，EMC和电能质量证据应围绕适用于光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度和谐波电流标准准备。本数据集中尚未确认土库曼斯坦公开发布的太阳能逆变器EMC技术法规；因此出口商应将EMC视为Turkmenstandartlary合格评定和Turkmenenergo项目审查事项，并针对每个项目确认具体报告范围。沙漠粉尘、高环境温度、外壳通风、电缆敷设、接地和浪涌保护设计可能影响EMC性能，应纳入技术档案。
summary.zht: 對於土庫曼斯坦光伏逆變器項目，EMC和電能品質證據應圍繞適用於光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度和諧波電流標準準備。本數據集中尚未確認土庫曼斯坦公開發布的太陽能逆變器EMC技術法規；因此出口商應將EMC視為Turkmenstandartlary合格評定和Turkmenenergo項目審查事項，並針對每個項目確認具體報告範圍。沙漠粉塵、高環境溫度、外殼通風、電纜敷設、接地和突波保護設計可能影響EMC性能，應納入技術檔案。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and power-quality standards
Turkmenstandartlary conformity assessment for regulated products where applicable
Turkmenenergo project technical review for grid-connected PV inverter installations

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents can support a technical package, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence for Turkmenistan. If a Chinese report cites IEC test methods, the report edition, test configuration, limits, accessory configuration, firmware version, and laboratory accreditation still need to be checked against the Turkmenistan project requirement.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC文件通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和CNAS实验室报告。这些文件可支持技术包，但不会自动等同于土库曼斯坦所需的IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据。若中国报告引用IEC测试方法，仍需对照土库曼斯坦项目要求核查报告版本、测试配置、限值、附件配置、固件版本和实验室认可。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC文件通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和CNAS實驗室報告。這些文件可支持技術包，但不會自動等同於土庫曼斯坦所需的IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據。若中國報告引用IEC測試方法，仍需對照土庫曼斯坦項目要求核查報告版本、測試配置、限值、附件配置、韌體版本和實驗室認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited China laboratory EMC test reports

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 EMC reports should be mapped against IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 clauses. Exporters should obtain or compile IEC-aligned reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, enclosure option, filters, cables, and accessories supplied to Turkmenistan. Confirm whether Turkmenstandartlary, Turkmenenergo, EPC contractors, or project owners require ILAC-accredited IEC reports. Do not assume EAC / TR CU EMC certificates are relevant; Turkmenistan is outside the EAEU and domestic conformity plus project acceptance is the controlling route.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004 EMC报告应映射至IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000条款。出口商应为供应至土库曼斯坦的具体逆变器型号、功率等级、固件配置、外壳选项、滤波器、电缆和附件取得或编制IEC对齐报告。请确认Turkmenstandartlary、Turkmenenergo、EPC承包商或项目业主是否要求ILAC认可的IEC报告。不得假定EAC / TR CU EMC证书相关；土库曼斯坦不属于EAEU，国内合格评定加项目验收才是控制路径。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004 EMC報告應映射至IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000條款。出口商應為供應至土庫曼斯坦的具體逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體配置、外殼選項、濾波器、電纜和附件取得或編制IEC對齊報告。請確認Turkmenstandartlary、Turkmenenergo、EPC承包商或項目業主是否要求ILAC認可的IEC報告。不得假定EAC / TR CU EMC證書相關；土庫曼斯坦不屬於EAEU，國內合格評定加項目驗收才是控制路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Turkmenstandartlary conformity, Turkmenenergo project review, procurement specifications, or project-owner requirements call for IEC-aligned EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence may support China domestic conformity or voluntary certification but is not automatically accepted as Turkmenistan IEC-aligned EMC evidence

source.publisher: Turkmenstandartlary (Main State Service for Standardisation, Metrology and State Supervision)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence for Turkmenistan PV inverter projects instead of relying only on GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 files. Confirm the exact EMC report scope with Turkmenstandartlary, Turkmenenergo, EPC contractor, or project owner, and include desert dust, heat, grounding, surge-protection, and installation-layout assumptions in the technical dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应为土库曼斯坦光伏逆变器项目准备IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量证据，而不是仅依赖GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004文件。请与Turkmenstandartlary、Turkmenenergo、EPC承包商或项目业主确认具体EMC报告范围，并在技术档案中纳入沙漠粉尘、高温、接地、浪涌保护和安装布局假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應為土庫曼斯坦光伏逆變器項目準備IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000 EMC及電能品質證據，而不是僅依賴GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004文件。請與Turkmenstandartlary、Turkmenenergo、EPC承包商或項目業主確認具體EMC報告範圍，並在技術檔案中納入沙漠粉塵、高溫、接地、突波保護和安裝布局假設。
